definition:
ακοπέω, -ῶ
 (σκοπός), [in LXX: Est.8:13, 2Ma.4:5 * ;] 
to look at, behold, watch, contemplate. Metaphorical, to look to, consider: with accusative of thing(s), 2Co.4:13, Php.2:4; with accusative of person(s), Rom.16:17, Php.3:17; before μή, Luk.11:35; σεαυτόν, before μή (see M, Pr., 192), Gal.6:1 (cf. ἐπι-, κατα-σκοπέω).†
 SYN.: βλέπω, θεωρέω, ὁράω  (AS)
